ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the qualification of the course */,
  "study_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study mode of the course */,
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the duration of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the course is offered */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application procedure for the course */,
  "course_option_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the course option */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees for the course */,
  "scholarship_available" INTEGER /* Whether a scholarship is available for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_qualification_id FOREIGN KEY ("qualification_id") REFERENCES qualifications ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES application_procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_duration_id FOREIGN KEY ("duration_id") REFERENCES durations ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_study_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_mode_id") REFERENCES study_modes ("study_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualification */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_modes" (
  "study_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study mode */,
  "study_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the study mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study mode */,
  "attendance_requirements" TEXT /* Attendance requirements for the study mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration */,
  "duration_name" TEXT /* Name of the duration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the duration */,
  "months" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application procedure */,
  "procedure_description" TEXT /* Description of the application procedure */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, administrator, faculty) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course applied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "personal_statement" TEXT /* Personal statement of the applicant */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference provided by the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course enrolled in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the enrollment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, withdrawn) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_options" (
  "option_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course option */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the option belongs to */,
  "option_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course option */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_options_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the requirement belongs to */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., prerequisite, eligibility) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "requirement_level" TEXT /* Level of the requirement (e.g., essential, desirable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the module */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the module is offered */,
  "module_leader" TEXT /* Leader of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_modules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_enrollments" (
  "module_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module enrollment */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module enrolled in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the module enrollment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the module enrollment (e.g., enrolled, withdrawn) */,
  "module_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_enrollments_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES course_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., lecturer, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_modules" (
  "staff_module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff-module assignment */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member assigned */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_modules_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES course_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_modules_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
